parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of distortion applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the distortion.
parameters-en.Mid: Controls the midrange frequency EQ of the distortion.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the distortion.
parameters-en.Presence: Adds a bit more high end sparkle to clean sounds and allows for driven signals to cut through a mix. At lower levels, provides thicker and warmer sounds.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the block.
